itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

address.streetAddress: HS 57, Noida Extension, Chauganpur, Knowledge Park V, Greater Noida, Khera Choganpur, Uttar Pradesh 201306

itemListElement.reviewBody: Terrible management. School principal has been missing for 2 months and is not responding to messages.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody:
DWPS lacks effective communication between administrators and parents, resulting in a negative experience. Despite our daughter attending for five years, we felt like mere clients.

Specifically, our encounter with Karuna Madam, the receptionist, was disappointing; she failed to assist us when we needed to pick up our child for a family event, and her response was dismissive.

Another distressing incident involved our child being placed on the wrong bus without any assistance from the staff, leaving us in a panic.

Additionally, we observed shortcomings in the completion of the syllabus and the provision of sports activities, despite the school's claims.

There is also a notable absence of interaction channels between the principal and parents.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody: The infrastructure of the school is fascinating. The teachers are very supportive and captivating, management of the school heads it top over other schools.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody: We recently visited to the new junior campus and fully mesmerized by seeing the infrastructure with latest Smart technology, Jungle theme and awesome amphitheater...our ward is equally excited to go to school every morning...thanks to whole DWPS faculty and Principal mam for playing a pivotal role in nourishing our child's overall personality...thanks again for reminding our childhood memories and those golden days.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My heartfelt feelings are about DWPS, DWPS is the best school in Noida extension.
I feel any school or institution becomes good having their principal and teachers. Principal ma'am very knowledgeable, sincere and sweet. When we meet her, everytime she gives her time and discuss about school environment, students progess and giving good parenting tips. School staff and teachers are awesome, very knowledgeable, understand to students their feelings and emotions, tackle them as just like mothers.
Very impressive teaching staff.

I highly recommend to everyone who searching school for their kids, they once visit to DWPS Noida extension. My 2 kids studying from pre nursery.

I m thankful to principal ma'am and all teachers.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am thrilled to see my 6year old daughter coming back from school daily jumping wilh full of excitement and lots of stories to tell. The new DWPS Junior campus is so colourful and has an innovative infrastructure that my daughter loves going to school.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My first visit to the school was really amazing. The admin staff was really helpful who helped us to give a walk around of the school and explained everything. Since my son joined DWPS in class 2, I was a bit sceptical on how things will be. But kudos to the class teacher on how she helped my son guide around the initial days. My son has learnt a lot in the class not just studies but also basic values and SEE learning was one of the highlights in helping my son having those moral values. Also the different programs offered by the school specially the SPACE program was out of the box thinking from the school.
The regular CTPDs also helped me to get to know my child’s growth and also where as a parent need to be more focused on. The class teacher was always available to help us.
Last but not the least, the new campus. Facilities available in the new campus are beyond imagination. Specially the smart class wherein children were able to do exercise and dance watching videos. The state of the art auditorium was the highlight.

To sum up my experience with the school, my son’s admission to this school was the best thing that I could have asked for.
Again hats off to the principal mam, all the teachers, admin staff, security staff and all the others for the best display of work ethics.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody:
School is very good to provide best education. I am very happy with the school. My daughter is doing very well. School works on overall development of the child.

The new branch of this school junior campus is really very good. Their infra structure is good . My daughter is very happy to see new campus. Their library she likes most . so many things . The entire staff and their class teacher is very good and supportive..
Best wishes...

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody: Our son loves this school. The latest Junior Campus is extremely beautiful and well made, keeping the latest education style in mind. The teachers and staff are kind and sincerely. Academic program is strong as well and it still leaves a balance to do other activities as well.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Knowledge park 5

itemListElement.reviewBody:
DWPS is undoubtedly one of the best schools in the vicinity. My son has been studying here for 1 year now and within this time we have seen him grow holistically. This talks about the well-rounded nurturing he has got at DWPS.
Both academics and co-curriculars are given equal importance. Students are encouraged to participate in all kinds of activities/ competitions which help to build their confidence and competitive spirit from a very early age.
The teachers go all out, to get their kids ready for every challenge and make them feel at home.
Thankful to this organisation and would highly recommend for every student.
